abstract: The payload that configures the Home Screen layout.

overview:
## Discussion

Specify `com.apple.homescreenlayout` as the payload type.

This payload defines a layout of apps, folders, and web clips for the Home Screen. This layout is locked and can’t be modified by the user.

If a Home Screen layout puts more than four items in the iPhone Dock the location of the fifth and succeeding items may be undefined but they will not be omitted.

To disable deletion of apps, set `allowAppRemoval` to `false` with [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/Restrictions].

### Profile availability

### Profile example

source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/DeviceManagement/HomeScreenLayout
crawled: 2026-03-10T15:24:00Z

# HomeScreenLayout

**Device Management Profile**

The payload that configures the Home Screen layout.

## Declaration

```swift
object HomeScreenLayout
```

## Discussion

Specify `com.apple.homescreenlayout` as the payload type.

This payload defines a layout of apps, folders, and web clips for the Home Screen. This layout is locked and can’t be modified by the user.

If a Home Screen layout puts more than four items in the iPhone Dock the location of the fifth and succeeding items may be undefined but they will not be omitted.

To disable deletion of apps, set `allowAppRemoval` to `false` with [doc://com.apple.devicemanagement/documentation/DeviceManagement/Restrictions].

### Profile availability

## Objects

- **HomeScreenLayout.IconItem**: An array of dictionaries that conform to the icon dictionary format.

## User Experience

- **Accessibility**: The payload that configures the accessibility features of the device.
- **Desktop**: The payload that configures the desktop wallpaper.
- **Dock**: The payload that configures the Dock.
- **Finder**: The payload that configures Finder settings.
- **ManagedMenuExtras**: The payload that configures menu extras.
- **Notifications**: The payload that configures notifications.
- **ScreensaverUser**: The payload that configures a user’s screen saver settings.
- **SetupAssistant**: The payload that configures Setup Assistant settings.
- **TimeMachine**: The payload that configures Time Machine.
